        ST    R1,ONE_SaveR1

        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   ONE_Fail
        ADD   R1,R0,#0
        NOT   R0,R0
        ADD   R0,R0,#1
        JSR   RangeCheck
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   ONE_Restore
        JSR   PUSH
        BRnzp ONE_Done

ONE_Restore
        ADD   R0,R1,#0
        JSR   PUSH
        LEA   R0,RangeErrorMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp ONE_Done

ONE_Fail LEA   R0,UnderflowMsg
        PUTS

ONE_Done
        LD    R1,ONE_SaveR1
        LD    R7,ONE_SaveR7
        RET

ONE_SaveR7 .BLKW 1
ONE_SaveR1 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; OpAdd
; ------------------------------------------------------------
OpAdd   ST    R7,BIN_SaveR7
        ST    R1,BIN_SaveR1
        ST    R2,BIN_SaveR2

        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   BIN_Underflow
        ADD   R1,R0,#0
        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   BIN_Restore1
        ADD   R2,R0,#0

        ADD   R0,R2,R1
        JSR   RangeCheck
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   BIN_Restore2
        JSR   PUSH
        BRnzp BIN_Done

BIN_Restore2
        ADD   R0,R2,#0
        JSR   PUSH
BIN_Restore1
        ADD   R0,R1,#0
        JSR   PUSH
        LEA   R0,RangeErrorMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp BIN_Done

BIN_Underflow
        LEA   R0,UnderflowMsg
        PUTS

BIN_Done
        LD    R2,BIN_SaveR2
        LD    R1,BIN_SaveR1
        LD    R7,BIN_SaveR7
        RET

BIN_SaveR7 .BLKW 1
BIN_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
BIN_SaveR2 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; OpMult
; ------------------------------------------------------------
OpMult  ST    R7,MUL_SaveR7
        ST    R1,MUL_SaveR1
        ST    R2,MUL_SaveR2
        ST    R3,MUL_SaveR3
        ST    R4,MUL_SaveR4

        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   MUL_Underflow
        ADD   R1,R0,#0          ; first popped
        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   MUL_Restore1
        ADD   R2,R0,#0          ; second popped

        AND   R3,R3,#0          ; sign flag parity

        ADD   R4,R1,#0
        BRzp  MUL_A_POS
        ADD   R3,R3,#1
        NOT   R1,R1
        ADD   R1,R1,#1
MUL_A_POS
        ADD   R4,R2,#0
        BRzp  MUL_B_POS
        ADD   R3,R3,#1
        NOT   R2,R2
        ADD   R2,R2,#1
MUL_B_POS
        AND   R0,R0,#0
MUL_LOOP
        ADD   R2,R2,#0
        BRz   MUL_SIGN
        ADD   R0,R0,R1
        ADD   R2,R2,#-1
        BRnzp MUL_LOOP

MUL_SIGN
        AND   R4,R3,#1
        BRz   MUL_CHECK
        NOT   R0,R0
        ADD   R0,R0,#1

MUL_CHECK
        JSR   RangeCheck
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   MUL_Restore2
        JSR   PUSH
        BRnzp MUL_Done

MUL_Restore2
        LD    R0,MUL_Orig2
        JSR   PUSH
MUL_Restore1
        LD    R0,MUL_Orig1
        JSR   PUSH
        LEA   R0,RangeErrorMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp MUL_Done

MUL_Underflow
        LEA   R0,UnderflowMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp MUL_Done

MUL_Done
        LD    R4,MUL_SaveR4
        LD    R3,MUL_SaveR3
        LD    R2,MUL_SaveR2
        LD    R1,MUL_SaveR1
        LD    R7,MUL_SaveR7
        RET

MUL_SaveR7 .BLKW 1
MUL_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
MUL_SaveR2 .BLKW 1
MUL_SaveR3 .BLKW 1
MUL_SaveR4 .BLKW 1
MUL_Orig1  .BLKW 1
MUL_Orig2  .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; OpMod   computes (second popped from stack) mod (first popped)
; i.e. if stack top is b and next is a, result = a % b
; remainder follows sign of dividend a.
; ------------------------------------------------------------
OpMod   ST    R7,MOD_SaveR7
        ST    R1,MOD_SaveR1
        ST    R2,MOD_SaveR2
        ST    R3,MOD_SaveR3
        ST    R4,MOD_SaveR4
        ST    R5,MOD_SaveR5

        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   MOD_Underflow
        ADD   R1,R0,#0          ; divisor
        ST    R1,MOD_Orig1
        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   MOD_Restore1Only
        ADD   R2,R0,#0          ; dividend
        ST    R2,MOD_Orig2

        ADD   R1,R1,#0
        BRnp  MOD_NotZero
        ; divisor zero -> restore and error
        LD    R0,MOD_Orig2
        JSR   PUSH
        LD    R0,MOD_Orig1
        JSR   PUSH
        LEA   R0,DivZeroMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp MOD_Done

MOD_NotZero
        AND   R3,R3,#0          ; dividend negative flag
        ADD   R4,R2,#0
        BRzp  MOD_DVD_POS
        ADD   R3,R3,#1
        NOT   R2,R2
        ADD   R2,R2,#1
MOD_DVD_POS
        ADD   R4,R1,#0
        BRzp  MOD_DVS_POS
        NOT   R1,R1
        ADD   R1,R1,#1
MOD_DVS_POS
        ADD   R0,R2,#0          ; working remainder starts as |dividend|
        NOT   R4,R1
        ADD   R4,R4,#1          ; -|divisor|
MOD_LOOP
        ADD   R2,R0,R4
        BRn   MOD_SIGN
        ADD   R0,R2,#0
        BRnzp MOD_LOOP

MOD_SIGN
        ADD   R3,R3,#0
        BRz   MOD_CHECK
        NOT   R0,R0
        ADD   R0,R0,#1

MOD_CHECK
        JSR   RangeCheck
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   MOD_Restore2
        JSR   PUSH
        BRnzp MOD_Done

MOD_Restore2
        LD    R0,MOD_Orig2
        JSR   PUSH
MOD_Restore1Only
        LD    R0,MOD_Orig1
        JSR   PUSH
        LEA   R0,RangeErrorMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp MOD_Done

MOD_Underflow
        LEA   R0,UnderflowMsg
        PUTS

MOD_Done
        LD    R5,MOD_SaveR5
        LD    R4,MOD_SaveR4
        LD    R3,MOD_SaveR3
        LD    R2,MOD_SaveR2
        LD    R1,MOD_SaveR1
        LD    R7,MOD_SaveR7
        RET

MOD_SaveR7 .BLKW 1
MOD_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
MOD_SaveR2 .BLKW 1
MOD_SaveR3 .BLKW 1
MOD_SaveR4 .BLKW 1
MOD_SaveR5 .BLKW 1
MOD_Orig1  .BLKW 1
MOD_Orig2  .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; OpXOR -- bitwise XOR without XOR instruction:
; a XOR b = (a AND ~b) + (~a AND b)
; ------------------------------------------------------------
OpXOR   ST    R7,XOR_SaveR7
        ST    R1,XOR_SaveR1
        ST    R2,XOR_SaveR2
        ST    R3,XOR_SaveR3
        ST    R4,XOR_SaveR4

        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   XOR_Underflow
        ADD   R1,R0,#0
        JSR   POP
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   XOR_Restore1
        ADD   R2,R0,#0

        NOT   R3,R1
        AND   R3,R2,R3
        NOT   R4,R2
        AND   R4,R4,R1
        ADD   R0,R3,R4
        JSR   RangeCheck
        ADD   R5,R5,#0
        BRp   XOR_Restore2
        JSR   PUSH
        BRnzp XOR_Done

XOR_Restore2
        ADD   R0,R2,#0
        JSR   PUSH
XOR_Restore1
        ADD   R0,R1,#0
        JSR   PUSH
        LEA   R0,RangeErrorMsg
        PUTS
        BRnzp XOR_Done

XOR_Underflow
        LEA   R0,UnderflowMsg
        PUTS

XOR_Done
        LD    R4,XOR_SaveR4
        LD    R3,XOR_SaveR3
        LD    R2,XOR_SaveR2
        LD    R1,XOR_SaveR1
        LD    R7,XOR_SaveR7
        RET

XOR_SaveR7 .BLKW 1
XOR_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
XOR_SaveR2 .BLKW 1
XOR_SaveR3 .BLKW 1
XOR_SaveR4 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; RangeCheck
; in:  R0 = candidate result
; out: R5 = 0 if -999 <= R0 <= 999, else R5 = 1
; ------------------------------------------------------------
RangeCheck
        ST    R1,RC_SaveR1
        ST    R2,RC_SaveR2

        LD    R1,NEG_999
        ADD   R2,R0,R1          ; R0 - 999
        BRp   RC_Fail

        LD    R1,POS_999
        ADD   R2,R0,R1          ; R0 + 999
        BRn   RC_Fail

        AND   R5,R5,#0
        BRnzp RC_Done

RC_Fail AND   R5,R5,#0
        ADD   R5,R5,#1

RC_Done LD    R2,RC_SaveR2
        LD    R1,RC_SaveR1
        RET

RC_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
RC_SaveR2 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; PUSH -- push R0 onto stack
; out: R5=0 success, R5=1 failure
; ------------------------------------------------------------
PUSH    ST    R1,PUSH_SaveR1
        LEA   R1,StackMax
        NOT   R1,R1
        ADD   R1,R1,#1
        ADD   R1,R1,R6
        BRz   PUSH_Overflow
        ADD   R6,R6,#-1
        STR   R0,R6,#0
        AND   R5,R5,#0
        LD    R1,PUSH_SaveR1
        RET

PUSH_Overflow
        AND   R5,R5,#0
        ADD   R5,R5,#1
        LD    R1,PUSH_SaveR1
        RET

PUSH_SaveR1 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; POP -- pop stack top into R0
; out: R5=0 success, R5=1 failure
; ------------------------------------------------------------
POP     ST    R1,POP_SaveR1
        LEA   R1,StackBase
        NOT   R1,R1
        ADD   R1,R1,#1
        ADD   R1,R1,R6
        BRz   POP_Underflow
        LDR   R0,R6,#0
        ADD   R6,R6,#1
        AND   R5,R5,#0
        LD    R1,POP_SaveR1
        RET

POP_Underflow
        AND   R5,R5,#0
        ADD   R5,R5,#1
        LD    R1,POP_SaveR1
        RET

POP_SaveR1 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; ASCIItoBinary
; in: R1 = number of digits in ASCIIBUFF (1..3)
; out: R0 = numeric value
; ------------------------------------------------------------
ASCIItoBinary
        ST    R1,ATB_SaveR1
        ST    R2,ATB_SaveR2
        ST    R3,ATB_SaveR3
        ST    R4,ATB_SaveR4
        ST    R5,ATB_SaveR5

        AND   R0,R0,#0
        ADD   R1,R1,#0
        BRz   ATB_Done

        LD    R3,NegASCIIOffset
        LEA   R2,ASCIIBUFF
        ADD   R2,R2,R1
        ADD   R2,R2,#-1

        LDR   R4,R2,#0
        ADD   R4,R4,R3
        ADD   R0,R0,R4

        ADD   R1,R1,#-1
        BRz   ATB_Done
        ADD   R2,R2,#-1

        LDR   R4,R2,#0
        ADD   R4,R4,R3
        LEA   R5,LookUp10
        ADD   R5,R5,R4
        LDR   R4,R5,#0
        ADD   R0,R0,R4

        ADD   R1,R1,#-1
        BRz   ATB_Done
        ADD   R2,R2,#-1

        LDR   R4,R2,#0
        ADD   R4,R4,R3
        LEA   R5,LookUp100
        ADD   R5,R5,R4
        LDR   R4,R5,#0
        ADD   R0,R0,R4

ATB_Done
        LD    R5,ATB_SaveR5
        LD    R4,ATB_SaveR4
        LD    R3,ATB_SaveR3
        LD    R2,ATB_SaveR2
        LD    R1,ATB_SaveR1
        RET

ATB_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
ATB_SaveR2 .BLKW 1
ATB_SaveR3 .BLKW 1
ATB_SaveR4 .BLKW 1
ATB_SaveR5 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; BinarytoASCII
; in:  R0 in [-999,999]
; out: ASCIIBUFF = sign + 3 digits + NUL
; ------------------------------------------------------------
BinarytoASCII
        ST    R1,BTA_SaveR1
        ST    R2,BTA_SaveR2
        ST    R3,BTA_SaveR3

        LEA   R1,ASCIIBUFF
        ADD   R0,R0,#0
        BRn   BTA_Neg
        LD    R2,ASCII_PLUS
        STR   R2,R1,#0
        BRnzp BTA_100

BTA_Neg LD    R2,ASCII_MINUS
        STR   R2,R1,#0
        NOT   R0,R0
        ADD   R0,R0,#1

BTA_100 LD    R2,ASCII_0_POS
        LD    R3,NEG_100
BTA_100_LOOP
        ADD   R0,R0,R3
        BRn   BTA_100_END
        ADD   R2,R2,#1
        BRnzp BTA_100_LOOP
BTA_100_END
        STR   R2,R1,#1
        LD    R3,POS_100
        ADD   R0,R0,R3

        LD    R2,ASCII_0_POS
        LD    R3,NEG_10
BTA_10_LOOP
        ADD   R0,R0,R3
        BRn   BTA_10_END
        ADD   R2,R2,#1
        BRnzp BTA_10_LOOP
BTA_10_END
        STR   R2,R1,#2
        ADD   R0,R0,#10

        LD    R2,ASCII_0_POS
        ADD   R2,R2,R0
        STR   R2,R1,#3
        AND   R2,R2,#0
        STR   R2,R1,#4

        LD    R3,BTA_SaveR3
        LD    R2,BTA_SaveR2
        LD    R1,BTA_SaveR1
        RET

BTA_SaveR1 .BLKW 1
BTA_SaveR2 .BLKW 1
BTA_SaveR3 .BLKW 1

; ------------------------------------------------------------
; Data
; ------------------------------------------------------------
Prompt          .STRINGZ "\nEnter command: "
BadCommandMsg   .STRINGZ "\nError: invalid command.\n"
UnderflowMsg    .STRINGZ "\nError: too few values on the stack.\n"
RangeErrorMsg   .STRINGZ "\nError: result out of range.\n"
TooManyDigitsMsg .STRINGZ "\nError: too many digits.\n"
DivZeroMsg      .STRINGZ "\nError: division by zero.\n"

ASCII_LF        .FILL xFFF6         ; -10
ASCII_LF_POS    .FILL x000A
ASCII_CR        .FILL x000D
ASCII_PLUS      .FILL x002B
ASCII_MINUS     .FILL x002D
ASCII_0_POS     .FILL x0030

NEG_ASCII_X     .FILL xFFA8         ; -'X'
NEG_ASCII_C     .FILL xFFBD         ; -'C'
NEG_ASCII_PLUS  .FILL xFFD5         ; -'+'
NEG_ASCII_STAR  .FILL xFFD6         ; -'*'
NEG_ASCII_MOD   .FILL xFFDB         ; -'%'
NEG_ASCII_AT    .FILL xFFC0         ; -'@'
NEG_ASCII_D     .FILL xFFBC         ; -'D'
NEG_ASCII_n     .FILL xFF92         ; -'n'
NEG_ASCII_0     .FILL xFFD0         ; -'0'

NegASCIIOffset  .FILL xFFD0
MaxDigits       .FILL #3
NEG_999         .FILL #-999
POS_999         .FILL #999
NEG_100         .FILL #-100
POS_100         .FILL #100
NEG_10          .FILL #-10

ASCIIBUFF       .BLKW 5
LookUp10        .FILL #0
                .FILL #10
                .FILL #20
                .FILL #30
                .FILL #40
                .FILL #50
                .FILL #60
                .FILL #70
                .FILL #80
                .FILL #90
LookUp100       .FILL #0
                .FILL #100
                .FILL #200
                .FILL #300
                .FILL #400
                .FILL #500
                .FILL #600
                .FILL #700
                .FILL #800
                .FILL #900

StackMax        .BLKW 8
StackBase       .FILL x0000

        .END"}
